sections.text: Paracetamol is used to relieve mild to moderate pain and to reduce fever.
Adults and adolescents should take the stated dose at the recommended interval and must not exceed the daily maximum.
Do not take this product if you are allergic to paracetamol or any of the ingredients.
Seek medical advice before use in liver disease. Do not take more than directed. Keep out of the sight and reach of children.
Serious side effects are rare, but allergic reactions and severe skin reactions require urgent attention.
Store below 25 degrees Celsius and keep the container tightly closed.
